name: file_manager
author: sonar@example.com
description: Manage files and directories ANYWHERE on the user's computer. Supports: list, read, write, move, copy, delete, search, mkdir, info, tree. Accepts absolute paths like C:\Users\User\Documents.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action: list, read, write, move, copy, delete, search, mkdir, info, tree, open

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File or directory path (absolute like C:\Users\User\Documents or relative to user home)

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: Text to search for inside files

examples: Show me what's in my Downloads
Search for .pdf files in my Documents
Create a new folder on my Desktop
